zh.Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Bussey於1422年10月21日出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Sir JOHN De BUSSY42歲，母親Margaret Katherine Cumberworth33歲。他和Elizabeth Berkeley至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1498年3月7日在英國林可爾史爾豪加姆享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾巴洛比哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Bussey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk, of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in Normandy, France: Boucé in Orne, from which came Robert de Buci mentioned in Domesday Book, Bouce (Manche), or Bucy-le-Long (Aisne). All are named with a Latin personal name Buccius (presumably a derivative of bucca ‘mouth’) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Bessey
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): perhaps a variant of   Bussey  .
French: habitational name from any of the places in Côte-d'Or and Loire named Bessey, from the Gallo-Roman estate Bassiacum, from the Roman personal name Bassius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Boosey
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English bosy ‘ox-stall, cow-stall’ (Old English bōsig).

variants.name: Bussie
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Bussey  , of Norman origin. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Bucey
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Bussey  .

variants.name: Busey
meanings: English: variant of   Bussey  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.description: Find a Grave shows the earliest burial in this churchyard was in 1423 Thomas de- Bozun BIRTH	1365 DEATH	12 Mar 1423 (aged 57–58) Barrowby, South Kesteven District, Lincolnshire, England BURIAL	 All Saints Churchyard Barrowby, South Kesteven District, Lincolnshire, England PLOT	Survival of monument not known. MEMORIAL ID	86429053

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Bussey was born on 21 October 1422, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir JOHN De BUSSY, was 42 and his mother, Margaret Katherine Cumberworth, was 33. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Elizabeth Berkeley. He died on 7 March 1498, in Hougham, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in All Saints Churchyard, Barrowby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth Berkeley. Il est décédé le 7 mars 1498, à Hougham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à All Saints Churchyard, Barrowby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Bussey è nato il il 21 ottobre 1422 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir JOHN De BUSSY, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Katherine Cumberworth, aveva 33 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Elizabeth Berkeley. Morì il 7 marzo 1498, nel Hougham, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a All Saints Churchyard, Barrowby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: John Busseyが1422年10月21日にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir JOHN De BUSSYは42歳，母Margaret Katherine Cumberworthは33歳であった。彼はElizabeth Berkeleyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1498年3月7日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホーウアムで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアバーロウビーアル サインツ チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Hougham, All Saints Churchyard, Hougham,: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 배로우비 앨 세인츠 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: John Bussey(이)가 1422년 10월 21일 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir JOHN De BUSSY(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Katherine Cumberworth(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Berkeley(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1498년 3월 7일 영국 링코실르 허그함에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 배로우비 앨 세인츠 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.21 October 1422–7 MAR 1497/1498: 21 de outubro de 1422–7 de março de 1498
pt.Hougham, All Saints Churchyard, Hougham,: All Saints Churchyard, Barrowby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Bussey nasceu em 21 de outubro de 1422, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir JOHN De BUSSY, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Katherine Cumberworth, tinha 33 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Elizabeth Berkeley. Ele faleceu em 7 de março de 1498, em Hougham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em All Saints Churchyard, Barrowby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Hougham, All Saints Churchyard, Hougham,: алл сеинц чурчярд, барроуби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Bussey родился 21 октября 1422 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir JOHN De BUSSY было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Katherine Cumberworth, 33. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Elizabeth Berkeley. Он умер 7 марта 1498 г. в местности хоугам, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц чурчярд, барроуби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
